title: ny fed / consumer expectations / household spending | Data Release Other | Household Survey Shows Reported and Expected Household Spend...
summary: The December 2023 Survey of Consumer Expectations shows median monthly household spending growth declined to 5.0% (from 7.1% a year prior), while year-ahead spending expectations fell to 3.0%, the lowest since December 2020. Notably, households report they would allocate 38.4% of an unexpected 10% income increase to debt paydown (highest since 2016), while only 16.0% would be spent or donated (lowest since the series began in 2015).
